first_line: Blessed is He Who remembereth the creation as He pleaseth. Verily, he who hath attained unto His remembrance and remained steadfast in His Cause hath attained unto victory [3.5s]

translations.text: Blagoslovljen onaj koji se sjeća svojih roditelja u razgovoru s Bogom.
พระพรจงมีแด่ผู้ที่ระลึกถึงบิดามารดาของตนขณะสนทนากับพระผู้เป็นเจ้า

Phước cho ai nhớ tới cha mẹ mình khi thông công với Thượng Đế.
